required_condition: Time to accelerate to 300 HU/s on flat surface
failure_condition: Acceleration reaches threshold noticeably early or late
Velocity peaks anywhere apart from exactly 350.0
Carrier naturally outpaces chasers or physics breaks bounding limits

required_condition: Max velocity during active throw windup sequence
failure_condition: Any movement > 0 allows lateral cheating of throw-vulnerability

expected_value: Winner magnitude strictly greater. Margin 24.0 triggers mutual stun

required_condition: Jumping invalidates active Charge state immediately
Wall normal collision < 0.7 triggers absolute stop
failure_condition: Player slides against perpendicular wall instead of stopping
